name: Hamburger Spanish Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the ground beef, onion, and green pepper over medium heat.
2. Add the cooked rice to the skillet.
3. Pour in the tomato sauce and hot water.
4. Stir in the mustard, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and sugar until well combined.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and cover the pan.
6. Simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the rice is tender.
7. Serve 4 to 6 people.
